Notice Of Petition And Petition Of Defendant And Petitioner Jackovics Enterprises, Inc. To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Edward Romero, Esq. of GORDON & REES, T:415.986.5900, for defendant/moving party;
Betzy Bras-Gonzalez, Esq. of BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, T:415.835.6777, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court provided both counsel with a copy of its tentative ruling which was contested and argued by plaintiff's counsel. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action Pending Completion Of Arbitration is granted.

The Court prepared and signed the order after hearing. [See order for details of the court's ruling.]

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
